system.description:
A Kill-team stands united and is always stronger supporting each other against their foes. As a Full Action, the Battle-Brother may order a Regroup to allow himself and those in Support Range of him to move up to twice their Agility Bonus in any direction, just as if they had made a Full Move Action. In addition, Regroup move does not trigger enemy Overwatch or Suppression Fire.

RankImprovement
4Battle-Brothers may also reload any weapons they are currently carrying (Half Action or Free Action reloads only)
system.effect: Kill-team in Support Range may move up to 2× AG Bonus metres without triggering Overwatch or Suppression Fire

improvements.effect: Battle-Brothers may also reload any weapons they are currently carrying (Half Action or Free Action reloads only)
